blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Verify that there is a buffer time configured between consecutive appointments.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having buffer time between appointments, but the evidence does not provide any information regarding the scheduling or timing of appointments that would indicate such buffer time exists. The confirmed start and end times of the bookings show that they are scheduled back-to-back without any indication of a cleanup period in between. This directly points to a gap in the requirement coverage for buffer time between appointments.
gaps: No evidence of buffer time between appointments.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add buffer time validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that there is a buffer time configured between consecutive appointments.
